question: You have about three years of caregiving experience across Riverbend Home Care and Cedar Ridge Assisted Living. Can you describe the mobility transfers you performed and any hands-on training you received for them?
reasoning: With the priority gaps covered, verifying the depth of experience and transfer competence is the last useful area before concluding.
